The Hotness

 Live 312 viewers
Curiomaster Soot — PoE 2 Spirit Walker Twister, Patch 0.5 Live

Huntress Spirit Walker is genuinely broken right now. The Owl ascendancy supercharges Twister wall bounces — extra projectiles turn the screen into a blender. Soot is live running endgame maps and testing the Oil Barrage Wyvern companion variant as an alt path for those who want safer, beastmaster-style gameplay.

Soot 'Puck Periwinkle'PoE2 0.5
 Live 104 viewers
Duke of Disc Golf Quijibo — Forza H6 Japan Mountain Passes, S1 Meta

AWD 30/70 front-to-rear split is the early meta across most FH6 classes. Quijibo is live tuning the 2023 Porsche 911 Turbo S to S1 ceiling, widely regarded as the strongest all-around S1 car at launch. Also benchmarking the Ford GT '05 AWD conversion — massive launch numbers on technical circuits.

Quijibo 'Benedict Pious'Forza H6
🔥 Featured 28:44
Hige Dragonlance Corps: The Dragon Kill — Pax Dei Holiday Hunt, Full VOD

Christmas Day 2025, the entire crew assembled in Pax Dei to hunt a fell dragon youngling. Archmage Jibbish dropped the Storm of the Mountain. Ranger Jerry fired stun arrows into its eye. The Boyer 23 CapinCrunch held the front line. Grimwolf flanked left. Hige was victorious — and deeply loud about it for approximately forty-five minutes afterward.

Full Crew84K viewsDec 26 2025Pax Dei
✦ Guide
Spirit Walker 0.5: Twister Owl vs Zookeeper — Full Build Breakdown

The two dominant Spirit Walker builds, compared head-to-head by Soot and Scholar Kody. Twister Owl uses the ascendancy's projectile speed buffs for wall-bounce scaling — ludicrous ceiling, twitchy playstyle. The Zookeeper Tame Beast build lets you field a captured Rathbreaker boss alongside its full Hyena pack — safer league start, surprisingly viable endgame.

Soot, Kody 'Ben Slattery'14 min readPoE2 0.5
✦ Guide
FH6 Meta Cars by Class: Japan Map Tier List, Launch Week

Japan's mountain passes reward precision over raw speed — a well-tuned A-class car beats a sloppy S1 every time. Quijibo's launch-week breakdown: S1 — Porsche 911 Turbo S, Ford GT '05 AWD; A-Class — GR86 '22 and Subaru BRZ for JDM purists; B-Class sleeper — Honda Beat '91, 15K credits, wins drift and drag events. AWD converts everywhere.

Quijibo 'Benedict Pious'10 min readForza H6
▶ Video 31:08
Baldur's Gate 3 Honour Mode — Hige Full Party Run, Highlights

Multiple near-wipes, one turn where Cajun Skald Tat cast Grease under the entire party and then someone lit a candle, and still somehow a clean win. Classic Hige energy, zero cuts. Commentary from the whole crew throughout.

Full Crew58K viewsBG3
✦ Guide
WoW Midnight Brewmaster: +10 M+ Guide, Shado-Pan Rotation

Apex's patch 12.0.5 M+ tank guide. Keg Smash priority, ISB uptime, and Black Ox Brew timing explained without padding. Maisara Caverns pull-by-pull: the double-pack before the first boss is where most groups die. Soot shows the exact stagger-and-purify line that solves it. Kody's Inscription crafting notes for tank BiS included.

Soot, Kody 'Ben Slattery'14 min readWoW
▶ Video 22:15
PoE2 0.5: Whirling Assault MA vs Spirit Walker Twister — Live Comparison

Two S-tier builds, same content, no edits. Soot runs Whirling Assault Martial Artist with Hollow Form clones and Lochtonial Caress — the current highest-ceiling build in the patch. Kody pilots the Twister Spirit Walker. Numbers, feel, and survivability compared honestly.

Soot, Kody67K viewsPoE2 0.5
✦ Guide
WarHam 3 Grand Cathay: Tiger Warriors DLC, Harmony Stacking, Why They Win

Cathay is top-tier and the Tiger Warriors DLC pushed them over the edge. Soot and Cajun Skald Tat's Immortal Empires breakdown: Harmony maintenance unlocks faction-wide buffs that compound hard late game. Miao Ying with five lores — including Life — carries campaigns almost alone. Dragon Crossbows shred everything at range. Cheap peasant chaff holds your lines.

Soot, Tat 'Bob Bartholemew'13 min readWarHam
▶ Video 18:33
Space Marine 2 Ruthless: Pugh, Jibbish and Tat — No-Death Run

The three Space Marine mains of Hige take on Ruthless co-op in the Termination mission. Class builds, communication style, and the moment Console Champion Pughdiddy single-handedly held the entire squad together through a suppression wave — captured live, full audio, no edits.

Pugh, Jibbish, Tat44K viewsSM2
▶ Video 42:11
Civilization 7 Deity Domination — Harold and Soot's Age Transition Playbook

The Age transition is the decisive moment in Civ 7 Deity. Everquester Harold Troutman and Soot walk through their full playbook: when to convert military momentum into infrastructure, which legacy bonuses survive the transition, and why you never skip a golden age on Deity difficulty — no matter how tempting the war looks.

Harold 'Harold Troutman', Soot39K viewsCiv 7
▶ Video 18:30
Happy Holidays from Higetown 2025 — Year in Review

The whole crew's 2025 recap. Best moments, worst wipes, the dragon kill, Fabulous Talz's singular arc as Duke Plisken the III, Grimwolf's SleazyBearShark highlight reel, Jaedaedae's IceCreamCakes drop of the year, and a preview of what 2026 looks like for the clan.

About HIGE.GG

Respawns

Our Story

HIGE.GG is a dirty dozen-ish gaming crew with roots going back to 1995. We began as a subset of the <Conquest> guild in EverQuest and Dark Age of Camelot — veterans of the long queue, the corpse run, and the four-hour raid that somehow went sideways on the last pull.

Our name comes from Papamnk Hige, a Fires of Heaven monk from EQ1 — the original HIGE, and still the standard we hold ourselves to: show up, play hard, have fun, don't take yourself too seriously.

Right now we are deep in Path of Exile 2 and Forza Horizon 6, with Total War: WarHam 3, Civilization 7, WoW Midnight, and Space Marine 2 also in active rotation. We share guides because we love the games. We stream because it is more fun with an audience. We have been doing this for 30 years and we are not stopping.

1995
